summary: Classified the ten live inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. Validator security repair routed #79273 and #68280 to central security handling as exact PR refs. Close, merge, fix, and raise-pr paths are unavailable for this job, and the remaining PRs have explicit maintainer-signal, active-author follow-up, failing checks, broad-diff risk, or unresolved review-bot findings, so the rest of the result remains conservative and non-mutating.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with passing proof but no completed maintainer/Codex review in this inventory artifact; requires maintainer technical correctness judgment before any merge path.
Unresolved Copilot review finding needs maintainer or contributor resolution before this focused fix can be considered landable.
Broad i18n PR with green checks but incomplete automated review; maintainer judgment is needed on translation scope and correctness.
Useful focused contributor PR linked to a live issue; requires maintainer technical correctness review rather than inventory closeout.
Security-sensitive trust-boundary documentation signal must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling before any backlog automation decision.
Security-sensitive auth-provider/probe-auth signal must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling before any backlog automation decision.
Broad dirty branch with failing checks and unrelated churn; maintainer decision is needed on whether to salvage, ask for a clean branch, or close outside this non-mutating inventory job.
Potentially useful feature fix for a live issue, but product semantics and technical correctness need maintainer review; no fix or merge action is available.
Maintainer-calibrated PR is not merge-ready in the artifact because checks and bot review findings remain unresolved; human follow-up is required in this no-fix/no-merge job.
Focused auto-reply bug fix with incomplete ClawSweeper review and failing checks; needs maintainer/contributor follow-up.
